features.name: dynamic left shift with bit-extracted shift amount from wide value
features.description: Code should include a dynamic left shift where the shift amount is derived from high-bit extraction (head/part-select) of a wide expression, causing the shift result width to grow exponentially

features.name: xor reduction on result of dynamic left shift
features.description: Code should include an XOR reduction applied to the result of a dynamic left shift, where the shifted value is wide and the shift amount is an expression

features.name: bit extraction from wide xor with sign-extended constant
features.description: Code should include a part-select of the high bits of a wide XOR expression where one operand is a sign-extended narrow constant cast to a wider unsigned type

features.name: fsm register with async reset and xor-reduction condition
features.description: Code should include an FSM state register with asynchronous reset where the next-state logic depends on an XOR reduction of a computed signal
